name: Las Olas
steps: Add ice to a shaker
Add all ingredients to the shaker
Shake hard for 20 seconds to dilute and combine
Strain over fresh ice into a rocks glass
Garnish with lemon wheel

name: Imperial Point Sour
steps: Add ice to shaker
Add first 2 ingredients to the shaker
Shake hard for 20 seconds to dilute and combine
Strain over fresh ice into a clear rocks glass
Float wine on top

name: Classic Margarita
garnish: salt or sugar rim; lime garnish
steps: Rim a rocks glass (when applicable) and fill with ice
Add ice to a small shaker tin
Add all 4 ingredients and shake hard to incorporate
Strain into rocks glass over fresh ice
Lime garnish

name: Skinny Margarita
garnish: salt or sugar rim; lime garnish
steps: Rim a rocks glass
(when applicable) and fill with ice
Add ice to a small shaker tin
Add all 3 ingredients and shake hard to incorporate
Strain into rocks glass over fresh ice
Lime garnish

name: Cadillac Margarita
garnish: salt or sugar rim; lime garnish
steps: Rim a rocks glass (when applicable) and fill with ice
Add ice to a small shaker tin
Add first 3 ingredients and shake hard to incorporate
Strain into rocks glass over fresh ice
Float 0.5 oz GM over the top
Lime garnish

name: Paloma
steps: Rim a rocks glass (when applicable) and fill with ice
Add ice to a small shaker tin
Add first 4 ingredients and shake hard to incorporate
Strain into rocks glass over fresh ice
Top with soda water
Lime garnish

name: Old Fashioned
steps: Build in rocks glass. DO NOT SHAKE
Add first 3 ingredients to rocks glass
Muddle then add ice
Add 2 oz whisky/bourbon/rye ofchoice
Stir 10-12 times or until glass is cold
Do not add extra garnish

name: Whiskey Sour (traditional)
steps: Add ice to small shaker tin
Add all 3 ingredients and shake hard until chilled
Strain into a rocks glass over fresh ice
Garnish w/ lemon wedge

name: Manhattan
steps: Chill coupe glass (soda water and ice)
BUILD IN A LARGE SHAKER
Add ice and and cocktail ingredients
Stir 10-12 times (shaker should be very cold to the touch
NEVER SHAKE)
Strain in chilled coupe glass and garnish with cherry

name: Kentucky Mule
steps: Fill a rocks glass w/ ice
Add ﬁrst 2 ingredients
Top w/ ginger beer
Lime garnish

name: Hot Toddy
steps: Fill the mug with hot water to heat through
Dump out the water and add the ﬁrst 3 ingredients to a mug
Top w/ fresh hot water then stir to incorporate
Garnish w/ lemon wedge

name: Irish Coffee
steps: Fill the mug with hot water to heat through
Dump out the water and add the ﬁrst 2 ingredients to a mug
Top w/ hot coffee then stir to incorporate
Top w/ whipped cream

name: Cosmopolitan
steps: Add ice and soda water to coupe glass to chill
Add all ingredients to the shaker tin & shake until cold and the ingredients are incorporated
Strain into chilled coupe glass
Garnish with a lime twist

name: Lemon Drop Martini
steps: Add ice and soda water to coupe glass to chill
Add all ingredients to shaker tin & shake until cold and the ingredients are incorporated
Strain into chilled coupe glass w/ a sugar rim (sugar rim is optional)
Garnish with lemon twist

name: Martini
steps: Add ice and soda water to coupe glass to chill
Empty coupe glass and add dry vermouth*- just enough to swirl around glass - then dump any remaining out
Add ice to large shaker tin; add 2.5oz of chosen vodka or gin
Stir rapidly until chilled. If a customer asks for shaken/extra cold
shake accordingly
Strain in the coupe glass
Garnish and serve (ask guest if they prefer olives or lemon twist)
options: Dirty Martini: Add a half ounce of olive brine to shaker tin
Filthy Martini: Add an ounce of olive brine to shaker tin
Dry Martini: Do not add vermouth to glass
Wet Martini: Add 0.5 oz of vermouth to the shaker tin w/ the vodka or gin
